title: eryngium goulartii
intro: Eryngium goulartii, also known as Mexican silver queen, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to Mexico and used as an ornamental. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Eryngium goulartii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
